visual_dna.product_description: The Pigeon Air Fryer is a sleek and modern kitchen appliance designed for versatile cooking functions such as frying, defrosting, roasting, grilling, and baking. It features a compact, rounded design with a glossy black finish accented by gold trim, giving it a premium and stylish appearance. The digital touch interface on the top provides intuitive controls and displays cooking settings, enhancing user convenience. The pull-out basket with a handle ensures easy access to food, while the overall design prioritizes functionality and aesthetics.

materials.texture_description: Smooth and polished surface with a reflective finish.

lighting.shadow_characteristics: Soft shadows cast to the right and below the product.
highlights: on the top surface and gold accents

structure.overall_shape: rounded rectangular with a slightly tapered top

motion_recommendations: slow 360-degree rotation to showcase the design
zoom in on the digital interface to highlight controls
pull-out motion of the basket to demonstrate functionality
camera_angle_suggestions: front angle to show the overall design
top-down angle to highlight the digital interface
side angle to emphasize the handle and basket
